title: Dekton Hi Vis Green Soft Grip Autolock Tape Measure 7.5m X 25mm- 7.5m/25ft-Hi-Vis Soft Grip| Impact Resistant Case| Metric Units| Belt Clip| Auto-lock| Secure Auto-lock Mechanism, Comfortable Grip
features: High-Visibility Design: The Dekton Hi Vis Green Tape Measure features a bright green casing that ensures easy visibility in any work environment. Ideal for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, its vibrant color helps you locate the tape measure quickly and reduces the risk of misplacing it on the job.

Impact-Resistant Case: Built to withstand the rigors of tough job sites, this tape measure is housed in a durable impact-resistant case. The rugged construction provides excellent protection against drops and accidental impacts, ensuring long-lasting performance even in demanding conditions.

Soft Grip for Comfort: Designed with user comfort in mind, the tape measure incorporates a soft grip handle. The ergonomic grip reduces hand fatigue during extended use, allowing for more precise measurements and improved control, making it easier to work efficiently.

Auto-Lock Mechanism: The secure auto-lock feature allows for smooth and reliable operation. This mechanism ensures that the tape stays in place once extended, reducing the risk of accidental retraction and improving measurement accuracy. Simply press the button to lock the tape in position and release to retract.

Metric Units for Precision: Equipped with a clear, easy-to-read metric scale, this tape measure provides accurate measurements in both centimeters and millimeters. The precise metric units make it an excellent tool for detailed and precise work, ensuring that every measurement is spot-on.
description: The Dekton Hi Vis Green Soft Grip Autolock Tape Measure 7.5m x 25mm is an essential tool for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike. Designed with both durability and usability in mind, this 7.5m (25ft) tape measure features a vibrant hi-vis green color that ensures visibility in any work environment, enhancing safety and reducing the risk of loss or misplacement. The tape measure is crafted with a rugged, impact-resistant case that withstands the rigors of daily use, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor applications. The soft grip handle provides exceptional comfort, reducing hand strain and ensuring a secure hold even in slippery conditions. This ergonomic design enhances user control, allowing for accurate measurements with ease. The tape measure’s auto-lock feature ensures that the tape stays securely in place once extended, preventing unnecessary retraction and facilitating precise measurements. This secure auto-lock mechanism not only improves measurement accuracy but also adds to the tool’s reliability. The Dekton tape measure is designed with metric units for ease of measurement and convenience in various applications. Its compact size and integrated belt clip allow for effortless carrying and quick access, ensuring that it is always within reach when needed. The tape’s high-visibility green casing not only enhances safety but also adds a touch of style to your toolkit. Whether you're a professional tradesperson or a home improvement enthusiast, this tape measure combines functionality with durability.
